examples: He grew lazy and slovenly in his habits.
Not only does slumping over your keyboard give you chronic backache and make you look slovenly, but it also increases your risk of heart disease.
Lisa was irritated by the slovenly attitude of her boyfriend Sean.
Both were out on a limb, ferociously challenging the slovenly relativism of everyone else.
Now men in their mid-20s through early 40s are rebelling against that slovenly attitude.
